description: Every evening, a new crowd of young creatives packs M8, a billiards hall with six tables located in Paris's 19th arrondissement. As those working in the luxury industry started coming, the venue's original regulars gradually faded away.

headline: 'In 1979, the Iranian left played a major role in the rise of the Islamic Republic'
description: Philosopher Stéphanie Roza and political scientist Amirpasha Tavakkoli explain how, throughout the 20th century, the political turmoil in Iran, torn between modernity and anti-modernity, ultimately led to Islamist victory.

headline: Luxury-loving Belgian cocaine kingpin 'Finger Cutter' to face justice
description: Considered by the authorities in his country to be one of the most important cocaine traffickers in Europe, Flor Bressers, a Belgian with an atypical profile, fond of luxury and architect of sprawling networks, is at the center of a legal saga.
